{{Infobox character
| name = Yerin's master
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Sword Sage, Underlord
| abilities = sacred artist, Steelborn body
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Yerin's master Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]]'s master was a powerful [[Sage]] known as the [[Sword Sage]]. He was described as a handsome man in his early thirties with blond hair and a penchant for wearing fine blue silk robes. As a [[Sage]], he was an elite figure capable of training disciples in the [[sacred arts]], though it is noted that [[Sages]] rarely take on apprentices. He was a practitioner of the [[Path of the Endless Sword]] and taught [[Yerin]] that no single [[Path]] is wide enough for two people to share. His training was rigorous and focused on the true costs of the [[sacred arts]], often avoiding easy explanations for his students. He was also known to be somewhat secretive regarding his own history and stories. Upon his death, he left [[Yerin]] several significant legacies, including a white-bladed [[sword]] that is unnaturally cold and carries an advanced [[binding]] technique. He also left her a solid [[gold badge]] featuring a [[sword]] emblem. Following his passing, [[Yerin]] has worked to utilize his [[Remnant]]—a mass of silver power that appears as a chrome ghost with six bladed limbs—to recover his memories and wisdom to further refine her combat techniques.}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Yerin's master]] died near the door of the [[Ancestor's Tomb]] after being poisoned and stabbed.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19">''Unsouled'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin's master]] is the strongest [[sacred artist]] she has ever met.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c3">''Soulsmith'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin's master]] is a [[Sword Sage]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin's master]] used a [[Steelborn body]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16">''Soulsmith'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin's master]] has a [[Remnant]] sealed in her core.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11">''Blackflame'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin's master]] has pills that can regrow limbs.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c9">''Skysworn'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin's master]] reached [[Underlord]] at about the same age she was.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c22">''Underlord'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] has a connection to her master.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Sacred artists]]
